Work / UI/UX / AMD Global Navigation IA Redesign
AMD

AMD Global Navigation IA Redesign

Lead IA

Enterprise-scale navigation and information architecture for AMD.com and product hubs.

Full IA and navigation redesign for AMD’s global web presence. Defined structure, labels, and hierarchy across product, developer, and support channels. Delivered sitemaps, wireframes, and specs for implementation.

Capabilities: Information Architecture, Navigation Design, Design Systems
